reason: PRD gap file reports docker-compose.yml missing OLLAMA_HOST and ./data volume, but these have already been implemented in root docker-compose.yml. The PRD gap evaluation is stale and should be re-run. Additionally, PRD specifies mDNS/Bonjour for .local hostname discovery which has not been implemented — tunnel.js provides ngrok/cloudflared LAN access instead. PRD should clarify whether mDNS is a hard requirement or if tunnel-based LAN access is acceptable.
proposedChange: 1. Re-evaluate PRD gaps — docker-compose OLLAMA_HOST and ./data volume are resolved. 2. Clarify mDNS requirement: is ngrok/cloudflared tunnel an acceptable alternative to mDNS/Bonjour .local discovery?
